The motivation or problem this solves.

## Testing

How was this tested? Include the HA version, entity types, and any Pivot behaviour you verified.

## Checklist

- [ ] Does not break entity creation, bank control, or button toggle
- [ ] HACS `hacs.json` and `manifest.json` versions updated if applicable
- [ ] Changelog updated (if applicable)
